overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link exploring a snowy mountain at night. The character walks along a ridge, encounters wildlife, paraglides down a cliff face, and climbs a rock wall in a winter wilderness environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy mountain ridge under starlight

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain path with visible footprints
snowy mountain peaks visible in the background under starlight
dark blue night sky filled with visible stars and light snowfall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide snowy mountain ridge at night. The landscape is open with distant mountain peaks visible under a starry sky with light snowfall. The environment is serene and empty except for the protagonist.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge approaching cliff edge

events.description: large white moose-like creature with antlers appears on the left side of the path
character reaches the cliff edge and stops walking

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cliff edge along the ridge, passing a wild animal on the left

notable_agents.action: large white moose with antlers standing on the snow, watching the character pass

entered.detail: evergreen tree covered in snow on the right side of the ridge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the snowy ridge toward a cliff edge. A large white moose stands on the left side of the path, and a snow-covered pine tree appears on the right. The character approaches the edge of the cliff, preparing for the next action.

events.description: character deploys paraglider and begins gliding down the mountain face
character lands on a snowy ledge at the base of the cliff

agents.ego_description: paragliding down the mountain face using a colorful canopy with red and yellow patterns

entered.detail: colorful paraglider canopy with red and gold patterns deployed above the character
vertical dark rock wall of the mountain cliff

segments.scene_description: The character deploys a paraglider and descends between mountain cliffs. The colorful canopy is visible overhead as the character glides down toward a snowy ledge below. The sheer rock face passes by on the right as the character controls the descent.

events.description: character begins climbing vertically up the sheer rock face

agents.ego_description: climbing vertically up the dark rock wall using handholds and footholds

entered.detail: visible climbing grips and ledges on the dark rock surface

segments.scene_description: After landing on a snowy ledge, the character begins climbing a sheer rock face. The camera follows the ascent closely as the character grips the dark rock wall. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character climbs upward, with the sky partially visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a serene, snowy mountain ridge that transitions into a steep descent and a vertical climb. It begins with the character walking through an open, starry landscape under light snowfall, moving steadily toward the edge of a high cliff. As the path narrows, the camera passes a large white moose and a snow-covered pine tree before the character deploys a colorful paraglider to glide down between sheer mountain walls. The scene then shifts from the open air to a confined space as the character lands on a snowy ledge and begins ascending a dark rock face. The camera follows the climb closely, moving from the wide expanse of the peaks toward the enclosed textures of the cliffside with the night sky visible above.
